s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR NO. 1 SUSPENSION ARM LH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear No. 1 suspension arm (inner side) with the bolt, and temporarily tighten the bolt.

s3.ptxt: Install the rear No. 1 suspension arm so that the bracket leans toward the front side of the vehicle as shown in the illustration.
Ensure that the paint mark faces the rear side of the vehicle.

s2.ptxt: Set the rear No.1 suspension arm in the position shown in the illustration, and fully tighten the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SUSPENSION MEMBER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Raise the rear suspension member with a jack.
Install the rear suspension member with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SUSPENSION MEMBER LOWER STOPPER LH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear suspension member lower stopper LH with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SUSPENSION MEMBER LOWER STOPPER RH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear suspension member lower stopper RH with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: TEMPORARILY TIGHTEN REAR NO. 1 SUSPENSION ARM LH

s2.ptxt: Connect the rear No.1 suspension arm (outer side) to the rear axle carrier with the bolt and nut and temporarily tighten the bolt and nut.

atten3.ptxt: When temporarily tightening the bolt, keep the nut from rotating.

atten4.ptxt: Insert the bolt from the front of the vehicle and temporarily install the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: TEMPORARILY TIGHTEN REAR NO. 1 SUSPENSION ARM RH

atten4.ptxt: Temporarily tighten the RH side using the same procedures as for the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: TEMPORARILY TIGHTEN REAR NO. 2 SUSPENSION ARM LH

s2.ptxt: Connect the rear No. 2 suspension arm (outer side) to the rear axle carrier with the bolt and nut and temporarily tighten the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: When temporarily tightening the bolt, keep the nut from rotating.

atten4.ptxt: Insert the bolt from the rear of the vehicle and temporarily install the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: TEMPORARILY TIGHTEN REAR NO. 2 SUSPENSION ARM RH

atten4.ptxt: Temporarily tighten the RH side using the same procedures as for the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: TEMPORARILY TIGHTEN REAR STRUT ROD

s2.ptxt: Connect the strut rod assembly rear to the axle carrier with the bolt and nut and temporarily tighten the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: When temporarily tightening the bolt, keep the nut from rotating.

atten4.ptxt: Insert the bolt from the inside of the vehicle and temporarily install the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: STABILIZE SUSPENSION

s2.ptxt: Jack up the rear axle carrier, placing a wooden block to avoid damage. Apply load to the suspension so that the installed bolt of the rear No. 1 suspension arm (inner side) is horizontally aligned with the center of the rear axle hub.

s-1.ptxt: FULLY TIGHTEN REAR NO. 1 SUSPENSION ARM LH

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: FULLY TIGHTEN REAR NO. 1 SUSPENSION ARM RH

atten4.ptxt: Fully tighten the RH side using the same procedures as for the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: FULLY TIGHTEN REAR NO. 2 SUSPENSION ARM LH

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: FULLY TIGHTEN REAR NO. 2 SUSPENSION ARM RH

atten4.ptxt: Fully tighten the RH side using the same procedures as for the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: FULLY TIGHTEN REAR STRUT ROD

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the bolt.
Fully tighten the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR STABILIZER BUSHING

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 rear stabilizer bushings to the outside of the stopper ring on the stabilizer bar.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR STABILIZER BAR NO. 2 BRACKET

s2.ptxt: Install the rear stabilizer bar No. 2 bracket.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR STABILIZER BAR NO. 1 BRACKET

s2.ptxt: Install the rear stabilizer bar No. 1 bracket.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR STABILIZER BAR
INSTALL REAR STABILIZER LINK ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear stabilizer link assembly LH with the 2 nuts.

atten4.ptxt: If the ball joint turns together with the nut, use a hexagon wrench (5 mm) to hold the stud.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR STABILIZER LINK ASSEMBLY RH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear stabilizer link assembly RH with the 2 nuts.

atten4.ptxt: If the ball joint turns together with the nut, use a hexagon wrench (5 mm) to hold the stud.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CENTER EXHAUST PIPE ASSEMBLY (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install a new gasket onto the front exhaust pipe.
Install the center exhaust pipe assembly with the 2 bolts and 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CENTER EXHAUST PIPE ASSEMBLY (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install a new gasket to the exhaust center pipe assembly.
Install the exhaust center pipe to the exhaust front pipe with the 2 nuts and 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL TAIL EXHAUST PIPE ASSEMBLY (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install 2 new gaskets to the exhaust tail pipes.
Install the 2 exhaust tail pipes with the 4 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR WHEEL
CHECK FOR EXHAUST GAS LEAKAGE

content1.ptxt: If gas is leaking, tighten the areas necessary to stop the leak. Replace the damaged parts as necessary.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT AND ADJUST REAR WHEEL ALIGNMENT
